mfa_enabled: Boolean: Required: True if MFA is enabled, False if disabled.
user: String: Required: Unique identifier or username of the account associated with the authentication event.
platform: String: Required: Name of the platform this data came from e.g. GitHub, Shuffle, Okta. Write the name directly, not a variable.
org: String: Required: Name of the organization or tenant associated with the user account.
message: String: Optional: Additional contextual or debug information related to the authentication event.
role: String: Optional: If known, explicitly specify the user’s role or privilege level (e.g., Admin, User, Viewer). This must be a fixed value, not a variable.
logon_type_id: Integer: Optional: Numeric identifier representing the type of logon (e.g., interactive, remote, service, batch).
activity_id: Integer: Optional: Identifier representing the specific authentication-related activity or event type.
status: String: Optional: Human-readable description indicating the outcome of the authentication attempt (e.g., Success, Failure).
status_id: Integer: Optional: Normalized numeric identifier representing the authentication status.(0 Unknown, 1 Success, 2 Failure, 99 Other)
status_detail: String: Optional: Additional explanation or context describing the meaning of the status_id value.
confidence: Integer: Optional: Confidence score (0–100) indicating the likelihood that the finding or event is accurate and valid.
category_name: String: Optional: Human-readable name of the category corresponding to category_uid.
start_time: Timestamp String: Optional: Time when the authentication event or session started, in ISO 8601 format.
severity_id: Integer: Optional: Numeric severity level indicating the risk associated with the authentication event.
status_code: String: Optional: System-generated code representing error or response status, useful for troubleshooting.
users_last_session: Timestamp String: Optional: Last recorded session time of the user in ISO 8601 format.
